texto: Two silent time zones had now merged to form the standard time of one man's fate
autor: and it is not impossible that the poet in New Wye and the thug in New York awoke that morning at the same crushed beat of their Timekeeper's stopwatch.
explicacao: Citação de and it is not impossible that the poet in New Wye and the thug in New York awoke that morning at the same crushed beat of their Timekeeper's stopwatch. sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Two silent time zones had now merged to form the standard time of one man's fate” articula tempo, vladimir-nabokov, pale-fire em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como pale-fire.
